==Card Redemption==
Throughout [[Kemet]], cards can be collected and exchanged for various rewards. Cards vary from tier 1 (white) to tier 5 (orange) and there's different types of each tier. Below is a list of the rewards that can be exchanged, and how many times.

==Tier 1 (White)==
'''Recommended:'''  Enhancement Injection, Gear
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="7" style="background-color:var(--white-bg)" | [[File:White Ankh.png|75px]]
| rowspan="7" | Ankh
|3x3||Enhancement Injection<br>Snail HP +140<br>Snail DEF +14
| rowspan="7" | 15 B-tads
|-
|2x1||Kemetic INTEL +1,500
|-
|3x1||2,000 B-tads
|-
|4x1||Novice Scroll +5
|-
|5x1||{{Gearlink|white|Exploration|Khopesh}}
|-
|6x1||{{Gearlink|white|Exploration|Linen Robe}}
|-
|7x1||Lottery Ticket +1
|-
| style="background-color:var(--white-bg)" | [[File:Mummy Cat.png|75px]]
|Mummy Cat||3x1||300 W-tads||200 B-tads
|-
| style="background-color:var(--white-bg)" | [[File:Papyrus Painting.png|75px]]
|Papyrus Painting||4x1||4,000 B-tads||Kemetic INTEL +330
|-
| style="background-color:var(--white-bg)" | [[File:Fayum Pottery.png|75px]]
|Fayum Pottery||4x1||600 Zombie Cells||200 B-tads
|}

==Tier 2 (Green)==
'''Recommended:'''  Enhancement Injection, Gear
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="7" style="background-color:var(--green-bg)" | [[File:Green Ankh.png|75px]]
| rowspan="7" | Ankh
|3x3||Enhancement Injection<br>Snail ATK +120<br>Snail RUSH +14
| rowspan="7" | 45 B-tads
|-
|2x1||Kemetic INTEL +3,000
|-
|3x1||4,000 B-tads
|-
|4x1||Novice Scroll +5
|-
|5x1||{{Gearlink|green|Exploration|Leather Shield}}
|-
|6x1||Gear Chest +40
|-
|7x1||Lottery Ticket +2
|-
| style="background-color:var(--green-bg)" | [[File:Kemetic Desert.png|75px]]
|Kemetic Desert||3x1||{{Relink|Dendera Tablet|blue}} +10||350 B-tads
|-
| style="background-color:var(--green-bg)" | [[File:Colossi of Memnon.png|75px]]
|Colossi of Memnon||3x1||Glue +50
|Offering Speedup +5m
|-
| style="background-color:var(--green-bg)" | [[File:Medinet Habu.png|75px]]
|Medinet Habu||4x1||6,000 B-tads
|Kemetic Treasure Map +1
|}

==Tier 3 (Blue)==
'''Recommended:'''  Enhancement Injection, Gear
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="7" style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)" | [[File:Blue Ankh.png|75px]]
| rowspan="7" |Ankh
|3x3||Enhancement Injection<br>Snail HP +160<br>Snail DEF +16
| rowspan="7" | 135 B-tads
|-
|2x1||Kemetic INTEL +4,500
|-
|3x1||6,000 B-tads
|-
|4x1||Novice Scroll +10
|-
|5x1||{{Gearlink|blue|Exploration|Tactical Helmet}}
|-
|6x1||Gear Chest +60
|-
|7x1||Lottery Ticket +2
|-
| style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)" | [[File:Karnak.png|75px]]
|Karnak||3x1||400 W-tads
|Angel Cells +100
|-
| style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)" | [[File:Luxor Temple.png|75px]]
|Luxor Temple||4x1||Offering Speedup +4h
|Demon Cells +100
|}

==Tier 4 (Purple)==
'''Recommended:'''  Enhancement Injection, Gear
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="7" style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)" | [[File:Purple Ankh.png|75px]]
| rowspan="7" | Ankh
|3x3||Enhancement Injection<br>Snail ATK +18<br>Snail RUSH +18
| rowspan="7" | 405 B-tads
|-
|2x1||Kemetic INTEL +8,000
|-
|3x1||8,000 B-tads
|-
|4x1||Expert Scroll +10
|-
|5x1||{{Gearlink|purple|Exploration|Priestly Robe}}
|-
|6x1||Gear Chest +80
|-
|7x1||Lottery Ticket +3
|-
| style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)" | [[File:Gaze of Horus.png|75px]]
|Gaze of Horus||4x1||Kemetic Treasure Map +50
|Organ Chest +1
|-
| style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)" |[[File:Flail and Crook.png|75px]]
|Flail and Crook||4x1||Expert Scroll +20
|Kemetic Treasure Map +2
|}

==Tier 5 (Orange)==
'''Recommended:''' Enhancement Injections, Gear, [[Kemet Pyramids#Modules|Heatseeker Module]]
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="7" style="background-color:var(--orange-bg)" | [[File:Orange Ankh.png|75px]]
| rowspan="7" | Ankh
|3x3||Enhancement Injection<br>Snail HP +200<br>Snail DEF +20
| rowspan="7" | 1,215 B-tads
|-
|2x1||Kemetic INTEL +8,000
|-
|3x1||12k B-tads
|-
|4x1||Master Scroll +10
|-
|5x1||Gear Chest +100
|-
|6x1||[[Kemet Pyramid#Modules|Heatseeker module]]
|-
|7x1||Lottery Ticket +3
|-
| style="background-color:var(--orange-bg)" | [[File:Nile.png|75px]]
|Nile||3x1||Wish Coin +1
|15 W-tads
|}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Realm]]
[[Category:Kemet]]
